briefdescription.para: Sets the CPU mode flag (CUDA backend only). During CPU mode, get_... functions returns host pointers, otherwise device pointers are returned.

parameterdescription.para: 1 if CPU mode is active, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Allocates a new csc matrix and copies A to it.
Allocates a new QOCOMatrix and copies A to it.
Frees QOCOMatrix.
Allocates a new QOCOVectorf and copies x to it.
Allocates a new QOCOVectori and copies x to it.
Frees QOCOVectorf.
Frees QOCOVectori.
Returns the number of nonzeros in a QOCOMatrix.
Computes elementwise product z = x .* y.
Returns x[idx].
Returns x[idx].
Performs x[idx] = data.

parameterdescription.para: Element to set at index idx.

briefdescription.para: Performs output .= 1.0 ./ input.
Returns &x[idx].
Returns the underlying data array of a QOCOVectorf.
Returns the underlying data array of a QOCOVectori.
Syncs vector data from host to device if needed (CUDA backend only). This is a no-op for non-CUDA backends. Note: This should NOT be called during qoco_solve to avoid CPU-GPU copies.
Syncs vector data from device to host if needed (CUDA backend only). This is a no-op for non-CUDA backends. Note: This should NOT be called during qoco_solve to avoid CPU-GPU copies.
Syncs Matrix data from device to host if needed (CUDA backend only). This is a no-op for non-CUDA backends. Note: This should NOT be called during qoco_solve to avoid CPU-GPU copies.
Returns the length of a QOCOVectorf.
Returns the underlying CSC matrix from a QOCOMatrix. This function provides access to implementation-specific data. For builtin implementation, returns the internal CSC matrix.
Computes the infinity norm of each column (or equivalently row) of a symmetric sparse matrix M where only the upper triangular portion of M is given. Works with QOCOMatrix*.

parameterdescription.para: Upper triangular part of sparse symmetric matrix.

briefdescription.para: Computes the infinity norm of each column of M and stores in norm. Works with QOCOMatrix*.

parameterdescription.para: An m by n sparse matrix.

briefdescription.para: Computes the infinity norm of each row of M and stores in norm. Works with QOCOMatrix*.

parameterdescription.para: An m by n sparse matrix.

briefdescription.para: Scales the rows of M by E and columns of M by D. M = diag(E) * M * diag(D). Works with QOCOMatrix*.

parameterdescription.para: An m by n sparse matrix.

briefdescription.para: Frees all the internal arrays and the pointer to the QOCOCscMatrix. Should only be used if QOCOCscMatrix and all internal arrays were malloc'ed.
Copies array of QOCOFloats from x to array y.
Copies and negates array of QOCOFloats from x to array y.
Copies array of QOCOInts from x to array y.
Computes dot product of u and v.

simplesect.para: Dot product of u and v.

briefdescription.para: Computes maximum element of array of QOCOInts.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QOCOFloat *x, QOCOFloat *y, QOCOFloat s, QOCOInt n)
memberdef.name: scale_arrayf

briefdescription.para: Scales array x by s and stores result in y. y = s * x.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QOCOFloat *x, const QOCOFloat *y, QOCOFloat *z, QOCOFloat a, QOCOInt n)
memberdef.name: qoco_axpy

briefdescription.para: Computes z = a * x + y.
Sparse matrix vector multiplication for CSC matrices where M is symmetric and only the upper triangular part is given. Computes r = M * v.
Sparse matrix vector multiplication for CSC matrices. Computes r = M * v.
Sparse matrix vector multiplication for CSC matrices where M is first transposed. Computes r = M^T * v.
Computes the infinity norm of x.
Computes the minimum absolute value of x.
Returns 1 if x contains nans, 0 otherwise.
